Feed from dynamically selected custom lora model that you want change by selection
Relay can connect a dynamic selected lora to another Lora or sage attention etc. that you want unchanged

same config key is used and picks from dynamic active route correct value as you configure. for demo i have changed samplers between base and distilled. CFG and steps are different as well. configure once and do not have to change !

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blury, extra limbs, mutilated, missing limbs, missing fingers, extra fingers.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A woman is sitting on a park bench on a sunny day, she is wearing a light blue knit crop top and a white mini skirt with white nike sneekers. the bench is wooden. the background shows birds randomly gathering on the grass. she has a calm serene expression enjoying the day. the photo is capturing her 3/4 left profile with her head and gaze towards camera.

The possibilities are endless as you can have one workflow to switch between zimage and flux for T21, use only flux for 12I, can try grouping ksampler so it activates based on zimage vs flux etc. same used variables can be reused at any time matching the key value pair. 
The relay nodes can be connected to really anything and any node can be converted to relay and the key of the relay will pick the current active path always.
